raw:
I'll verify the work against the task requirements by reading the actual files.
Good — PHASE2-SPEC.md is gone from docs. Let me verify the rest.
CHARTER looks comprehensive. Now the sub-pages, crew files, install.sh, architecture, README, and git diff.
Both sub-pages are accurate and detailed. Now let me verify against the actual code, crew files, install.sh, architecture, README, and git diff.
Crew prompts updated correctly with charter-reading, frontmatter intact. No .ts files changed. Now install.sh, README, architecture.
All deliverables look complete and accurate. Let me verify the code facts against the actual source to confirm no inaccuracies, plus confirm AGENTS.md crew list and no .ts changes.
No .ts changes. AGENTS.md crew list current. Let me verify a couple of the cited code facts to ensure accuracy — DoD checks, gate stages, and ship action.
All code facts in the docs match the actual source: gate kinds/stages, the six DoD checks, inconclusive reviewer blocks, backward-compat verify gate. The documentation is accurate, not fabricated.

All deliverables verified:
- CHARTER.md restructured as kernel with current Roles table, loop, safety, split rule (verbatim "graduate it to"), and links to both sub-pages
- gate-pipeline.md and definition-of-done.md exist, accurate, self-contained with web/mobile examples
- PHASE2-SPEC.md and foreman-impact-probe.md deleted
- planner.md + reviewer.md have best-effort charter-read instructions, frontmatter unchanged
- install.sh has idempotent charter symlink + echo
- architecture.md updated (no "askuser (planned)", current domains/pipeline, links to CHARTER)
- README.md layout tree references CHARTER + charter/, no PHASE2-SPEC
- No .ts files changed; all tests pass

VERDICT: PASS
